blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Inngest dev server not running on port 8288. The sync endpoint calls await inngest.send() which fails when Inngest dev server is unavailable. The endpoint logic is correct (sets sync_status to 'queued' before dispatch), and unit tests confirm the dispatch works with mocked Inngest client. This is an infrastructure dependency, not a code issue.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: API' and 'Flow Validator Guidance: database' sections with isolation rules, auth instructions, and environment details for multi-provider-backend testing
Documented Next.js App Router slug name conflict fix and Inngest dev server dependency in Known Quirks

Fixed Next.js App Router routing conflict: merged [id] and [provider] dynamic segments under single [provider] slug for /api/connections/ routes. Updated route handlers, tests (connections tests + inngest tests), and architecture.md
